name: Acorn Squash Stuffed with Apple Couscous
recipeIngredient: 4 Acorn squash halves, halved and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Place couscous in a small mixing bowl. Set aside.
2. Bring apple juice to a boil in a small saucepan and pour over the couscous. Cover and set aside until the juice is absorbed. This will take 15 minutes.
3. Stir in the fruit, apple juice concentrate, cardamom, and maple syrup. Set aside.
4. Steam squash halves until tender, about 15 minutes. Drain and place on a baking sheet.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F. Fill squash halves with the couscous mixture and bake for 20 minutes.
6. Top with pecans and serve.
